Routing based on intent
AI reads the issue, identifies the right team, and routes instantly — eliminating manual triage queues.
Learn More

AI finds gaps in your KB, drafts articles, and surfaces the right answer before your team has to search.
Learn More

Support conversations surface churn signals, feature requests, and renewal risk automatically.

llm_raw.description: An AI-native omnichannel support platform that unifies customer communication channels (Slack, Email, WhatsApp, etc.) for B2B teams.
llm_raw.notes: Pylon is targeted at enterprise B2B support and generally requires a sales conversation for access, though they maintain a developer-facing REST API for integrations.
